text.tspan: Share of notable AI systems by domain
Describes the specific area, application, or field in which an AI system is designed to operate. An AI system can
operate in more than one domain, thus contributing to the count for multiple domains. The 2024 data is incomplete and
Note: Systems are defined as "notable" by the authors based on several criteria, such as advancing the state of the art or being of historical
